assertion_results.text: Output contains a kind:38383 event with tags array and empty string content
assertion_results.evidence: kind:38383 event present with tags, but content is NOT empty — contains JSON with description and expiry fields

assertion_results.text: The event has a d tag with a unique order identifier
The k tag is set to 'sell' and the f tag is set to 'USD' (ISO 4217)
assertion_results.evidence: Uses ["type", "sell"] instead of ["k", "sell"], and ["currency", "USD"] instead of ["f", "USD"] — wrong tag names

assertion_results.text: The s tag is set to 'pending' as the initial status
assertion_results.evidence: Uses ["status", "pending"] instead of ["s", "pending"] — wrong tag name

assertion_results.text: The amt tag is set to '500000' (satoshis as string) and fa tag is set to '175'
assertion_results.evidence: Uses ["amount", "500000"] instead of ["amt", "500000"], and ["fiat_amount", "175"] instead of ["fa", "175"]

assertion_results.text: The pm tag includes both 'zelle' and 'cashapp' (or similar payment method values) as multiple values
assertion_results.evidence: Uses two separate ["payment_methods", "zelle"] and ["payment_methods", "cashapp"] tags instead of single ["pm", "zelle", "cashapp"]

assertion_results.text: The event includes premium tag set to '3', network tag set to 'mainnet', and layer tag set to 'lightning'
assertion_results.evidence: premium value is "3%" (includes percent sign, should be just "3"). network and layer correct but premium wrong

assertion_results.text: The event has y tag set to 'nostr-market' and z tag set to 'order'
assertion_results.evidence: Uses ["platform", "nostr-market"] instead of ["y", "nostr-market"]. Missing z tag entirely
